hooks.command: cd C:/Users/trust/teardown-mp-patches && python -m tools.status 2>&1 || echo 'tools.status failed - run manually'

node -e "var i;try{i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'))}catch(e){process.exit(0)}var p=(i.tool_input||{}).file_path||'';if(/Documents[\\\/]Teardown[\\\/]mods/i.test(p)){process.stderr.write('BLOCKED: Do NOT edit in Documents/Teardown/mods/ — use game install dir');process.exit(2)}if(/Teardown[\\\/]mods[\\\/]/i.test(p)){try{var r=require('child_process').execSync('tasklist /FI \"IMAGENAME eq teardown.exe\" /NH',{encoding:'utf8',stdio:'pipe',timeout:3000});if(r.indexOf('teardown.exe')>=0){process.stderr.write('WARNING: Teardown is running. Changes may not take effect until restart.')}}catch(e){}}"
